description: Botbox webview<->backend trust boundary (KTD8 / R18). This file is the permission allowlist: only the commands enumerated here are reachable from the webview. Every later unit that adds a backend command MUST add its `app:allow-*` permission here, or the command stays unreachable by design. Unused plugin scopes (e.g. opener) are intentionally NOT granted in U1.
